comment: Cross-adapter parity contract between @eigenpal/docx-editor-react and @eigenpal/docx-editor-vue. Tracked in issue #475 Phase 3. Drives `bun run check:parity-contract`, which parses each adapter's docs/api/<slug>/index.api.md, applies this contract, and fails on undocumented drift. Adding a new prop or ref method to either adapter forces a contract update — there is no way to silently introduce divergence.

deferredInVue.agentPanel: AI agent panel UI. Vue adapter ships without the agent surface; React-only until the Vue agent components land.
deferredInVue.author: Author name for new comments/changes. Required when comments API arrives in Vue.
deferredInVue.comments: Comment threads. Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.externalContent: Sandboxed external-content rendering mode. React-only escape hatch.
deferredInVue.loadingIndicator: Custom loading slot. Vue uses default slot via VNodeChild.
deferredInVue.marginGuideColor: Pairs with showMarginGuides — both deferred together.
deferredInVue.onChange: Document-change callback. Critical parity gap — Vue currently exposes layout via composables but not via a single onChange prop.
deferredInVue.onCommentAdd: Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.onCommentDelete: Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.onCommentReply: Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.onCommentResolve: Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.onCommentsChange: Part of the Vue comments API gap.
deferredInVue.onCopy: Clipboard event hooks. Vue exposes via useClipboard composable instead.
deferredInVue.onCut: Clipboard event hooks. Vue exposes via useClipboard composable instead.
deferredInVue.onEditorViewReady: PM EditorView ready callback. Vue exposes editorView via useDocxEditor instead.
deferredInVue.onError: Error callback. Vue currently exposes via useDocxEditor option.
deferredInVue.onPaste: Clipboard event hook. Vue exposes via useClipboard composable instead.
deferredInVue.onRenderedDomContextReady: Plugin host ready callback. Pairs with pluginRenderedDomContext.
deferredInVue.onSave: Save-to-buffer callback. Critical parity gap — Vue uses useDocxEditor().save() that returns a Blob, not a prop callback.
deferredInVue.onSelectionChange: Selection observer. Vue exposes via useSelectionHighlight composable instead.
deferredInVue.placeholder: Empty-state slot. Vue uses default slot pattern.
deferredInVue.pluginOverlays: Plugin overlay slot. Pairs with pluginRenderedDomContext.
deferredInVue.pluginRenderedDomContext: Plugin host hand-off. Vue plugin-api is a smaller surface.
deferredInVue.pluginSidebarItems: Sidebar plugin items. Pairs with the Vue plugin-api gap.
deferredInVue.printOptions: Print configuration. Vue uses onPrint without options object.
deferredInVue.rulerUnit: Ruler unit toggle (inch/cm). Vue uses inch only currently.
deferredInVue.showMarginGuides: Margin guide overlay. Pairs with marginGuideColor — both deferred together.

vueExclusive.showMenuBar: Vue adapter ships a Google-Docs-style menu bar above the toolbar. React uses a single toolbar with no menu-bar concept.

ref.comment: DocxEditorRef parity. React's DocxEditorRef declares every member directly. Vue's DocxEditorRef intersects EditorRefLike (from @eigenpal/docx-editor-agents/bridge) plus its own additions — so members inherited via EditorRefLike are NOT enumerated in Vue's snapshot, but ARE callable at runtime. The contract uses three buckets: `paired` (explicit on both sides), `pairedViaInheritance` (explicit on React, inherited via EditorRefLike on Vue), and `vueExclusive` (only on Vue's DocxEditorRef).

pairedViaInheritance.addComment: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.applyFormatting: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.findInDocument: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getComments: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getCurrentPage: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getDocument: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getEditorRef: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Returns the inner editor handle (React: PagedEditorRef; Vue: useDocxEditor() composable handle).
pairedViaInheritance.getPageContent: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getSelectionInfo: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.getTotalPages: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.onContentChange: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.onSelectionChange: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.proposeChange: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.replyToComment: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.resolveComment: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.scrollToParaId: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.
pairedViaInheritance.setParagraphStyle: Inherited via EditorRefLike. Identical signature on both adapters.

vueExclusive.destroy: Vue's component-level imperative teardown. React's DocxEditorRef omits this because React handles unmount automatically; both adapters expose `destroy` via their `renderAsync()` return (DocxEditorHandle from core's EditorHandle base).
